Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

BRM 4, 19 [Ašipus’ Almanac][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] x ⸢8 10 12 10⸣ 1(IKU)gana₂ ša₂ GIR₂.⸢TAB ZI⸣

(o 1') [...] ... (zodiacal sign) 8, 10° = (sign) 12, 10°: the Field (sign 12) is the distance of the Scorpion (sign 8).

o 2'2'

8 ⸢21 U₄⸣.[DA]-KAM a-mir-ka ana IGI-ka ḫa-de-e : ra-a-⸢ši⸣

(o 2') (Sign) 8, 12°: fixed date for whoever sees you to become joyful (or): rejoice in front of you.

o 3'3'

8 21 5 3 UR.A ša₂ GIR₂.TAB ⸢ZI⸣

(o 3') (Sign) 8, 21° = (sign) 5, 3°: the Lion (sign 5) is the distance of the Scorpion.

o 4'4'

9v 10 U₄.DA-KAM MUNUS šu-ud-bu-bu 9v 10 1 10 LU ša₂ ⸢PA.BIL⸣.<SAG> ⸢ZI⸣

(o 4') (Sign) 9, 10°: fixed date for making a woman speak. (Sign) 9, 10° = (sign) 1, 10°: the Hireling (sign 1) is the distance of Pabilsag (sign 9).

o 5'5'

9v 21 U₄.DA-KAM a-mir-ka ŠU.SI-šu₂ ana SIG₅ti₃ ana [...]

(o 5') (Sign) 9, 21°: fixed date for whoever sees you to point his finger in kindness to [...]. (Sign) 9, 21° = (Sign) 6, 3°: the Furrow (sign 6) is the [...] of Pabilsag (sign 9).

o 6'6'

ta-ra-aṣ 9v 21 6 3 ABSIN ša₂ PA.[BIL.SAG x]

o 7'7'

10 10 U₄.DA-KAM ši-kin KU₃.BABBAR 10 10 2 10 MUL₂.MUL₂ ⸢ša₂⸣ [...]

(o 7') (Sign) 10, 10°: fixed date for deposit of silver. (Sign) 10, 10° = (sign) 2, 10°: the Bristle (sign 2) is the [...] of [...].

o 8'8'

10 21 U₄.DA-KAM ARAD LU₂ la₃ ZAḪ₂ ŠA₃ ARAD u ⸢GEME₂⸣ [...]

(o 8') (Sign) 10, 21°: fixed date for a man's slave not to disappear; the heart of a slave or slave-woman [...]. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 10, 21° = (sign) 7, 3°: the Scales (sign 7) is the [...] of the Goatfish (sign 10).

o 9'9'

DU₃-ma SILIM 10 21 7 3 RIN₂ ša₂ ⸢MAŠ₂⸣ [x]

o 10'10'

11 10 U₄.DA-KAM MUNUS-ka ana NITA IGI la₃ IL₂e 11 10 3 10 MAŠ.MAŠ ša₂ ⸢GU ZI⸣

(o 10') (Sign) 11, 10°: fixed date for your wife not to raise her eye to (another) man. (Sign) 11, 10° = (sign) 3, 10°: the Twins (sign 3) are the distance of Gula (sign 11).

o 11'11'

11 21 U₄.DA-KAM ḪUL.GIG 11 21 8 3 GIR₂.TAB ša₂ GU ZI

(o 11') (Sign) 11, 21°: fixed date for hate. (Sign) 11, 21° = (month) 8, 3°: the Scorpion (sign 8) is the distance of Gula (sign 11).

o 12'12'

12 27 U₄.DA-KAM UŠ₁₁.BUR₂.RU.DA 12 27 11 21 GU ša₂ GU ZI1

(o 12') (Sign) 12, 27°: fixed date for the ritual to dispel sorcery. (Sign) 12, 27° = (sign) 11, 21°: Gula (sign 11) is the distance of Gula (sic, for the Field, sign 12).

o 13'13'

12 28 U₄.DA-KAM GIR₃ ḪULti₃ ina E₂ NA KU₅si 12 28 12 4 GU ša₂ 1(IKU)gana₂ ZI2

(o 13') (Sign) 12, 28°: fixed date for blocking the foot of evil from a man's house. (Sign) 12, 28° = (sign) 12, 4°: Gula (sic, for the Field, sign 12) is the distance of the Field (sign 12).

o 14'14'

12 29v U₄.DA-KAM iš-di-iḫ lu₂KURUN₂.NA šuKAR

(o 14') (Sign) 12, 29°: fixed date for rescuing the brewer's profit; and (for) an eclipse. (Sign) 12, 29° = (sign) 12, 17°: Gula (sic, for the Field, sign 12) is the distance of the Field (sign 12).

o 15'15'

u AN.TA.LU₃ 12 29v!(19v) 12 17 GU.LA ša₂ 1(IKU)gana₂ ZI3

o 16'16'

1 21 UŠ₁₁.ZU BUR₂.RU.DA ana LU₂ GIG la₃ TEe

(o 16') (Sign) 1, 21°: (fixed date for) undoing sorcery; (for) illness not to approach a man; (for) healing the head; to drive out his shivering; to heal a wound; (for) evil not to approach a man's house. You perform (these) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 1, 21° = (sign) 10, 3°: the Goatfish (sign 10) is the distance of the Hireling (sign 1).

o 17'17'

SAG.DU TI.LA ra-i-ib-šu a-na šu-ṣi-i

o 18'18'

⸢si⸣-im-ma a-na TI.LA UŠ₂ MUNUS ana KU₅si ḪUL ana E₂ LU₂ la₃ TE

o 19'19'

⸢DIM₂⸣-ma AL.SILIM 1 21 10 3 MAŠ₂ ša₂ LU ZI

Reverse
r 1r 1

2 12 LIL₂.⸢LA₂.EN.NA⸣ KI.SIKIL.LIL₂.LA₂.⸢EN⸣.NA ZIḫi

(r 1) (Sign) 2, 12°: (fixed date for) expelling the lilû-demon (or) the ardat-lilî demon. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 2, 12° = (sign) 7, 6°: the Scales (sign 7) is the distance of the Bristle.

r 22

DIM₂-ma AL.SILIM 2!(4) 12 7 6 RIN₂ ša₂ MUL₂.MUL₂ ZI

r 33

⸢4 12 LIL₂⸣.LA₂.EN.NA KI.SIKIL.LIL₂.LA₂.EN.⸢NA⸣ ZIḫi

(r 3) (Sign) 4, 12°: (fixed date for) expelling the lilû-demon (or) the ardat-lilî demon. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 4, 12° = (sign) 9, 6°: Pabilsag (sign 9) is the distance [...] the Crab.

r 44

DIM₂-ma AL.SILIM 4 12 9v 6 PA.⸢BIL⸣.<SAG> [x] ⸢ALLA ZI⸣

r 55

5!(2) 29v AN.TA.ŠUB.BA be-en-na dLUGAL—UR₃.RA ŠU DINGIR.RA [...]

(r 5) (Sign) 5, 29°: (fixed date for) expelling falling sickness, epilepsy, Bel-uri, the hand of a god, [...]. You perform (them) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 5, 29° = (sign) 5, 17°: the Furrow (sign 5) is the distance of the Lion.

r 66

ZIḫi DIM₂-ma AL.SILIM 5 29v 5 17 ABSIN ša₂ ⸢UR!.A ZI⸣

r 77

6 24 GIDIM DABbat KI LU₂ ana KEŠ₂ NU LU₂ ana UŠ₂ pa-qa₂-⸢du!⸣ ana ⸢GIDIM⸣ [x]

(r 7) (Sign) 6, 24°: (fixed date for) seizing a ghost (and) attaching to a man; to consign a man's effigy to death; to keep giving [...] to a ghost to drink; to drive out wrongdoing. You perform (these) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 6, 24° = (sign) 4, 12°: [...] is the distance [...].

r 88

ana NAG.NAGe ḫi-bil-tu₄ E₃i DIM₂-ma AL.SILIM 6 24 4 12 [...] ZI

r 99

7 11 MUNUS GEN.NA DIM₂-ma ḫi-ṭa₄ la₃ TUKU DIM₂-ma AL.SILIM 7 11 11 23!(12) ⸢GU ša₂ RIN₂ ZI⸣

(r 9) (Sign) 7, 11°: (fixed date for) performing (the ritual) "having sex with a woman" so as not to acquire sin. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 7 11° = (sign) 11, 12°: Gula (sign 11) is the distance of the Scales (sign 7).

r 1010

7 16 DINGIR ana qe₂-re-e iš₈-tar₂ ana qe₂-re-e sa-gal-la ana TI.LA

(r 10) (Sign) 7, 15°: (fixed date for) inviting a god; inviting a goddess; curing sagallu-illness; purifing a temple; blocking an illness; healing a sore hand; healing a stone (in the body); holding back diarrhoea. You perform (these) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 7, 16° = (sign) 1, 29°: the Hireling (sign 1) is the distance of the Scales.

r 1111

E₂ ana ḫu-up-pi₂ GIG ana e-se-ri ŠU GIG ana TI.LA

r 1212

NA₄ ana TI.LA ŠA₃.SI.SI ana ka-le-e DIM₂-ma ⸢AL⸣.[SILIM]

r 1313

7 16 1 28 LU ša₂ RIN₂ ⸢ZI⸣

r 1414

8 18 IDIM u NUN EME.SIG la₃ GU₇ : GABA.RI 8 18 3 24 MAŠ.MAŠ ša₂ ⸢GIR₂⸣.[TAB x]

(r 14) (Sign) 8, 18°: (fixed date for) a nobleman or prince not to give (or) receive slander. (Sign) 8, 18° = (sign) 3, 24°: the Twins (sign 3) are the [...] of the Scorpion (sign 8).

r 1515

8 21 la₃ ši-il-la-ti ana TUKU LU₂ ina IGI LU₂ ša₂-ka-nu ŠUR₂.⸢ḪUN⸣.[GA₂]

(r 15) (Sign) 8, 21°: (fixed date for) acquiring lack of iniquity; appointing a man in front of (another) man; appeasement of anger; not receiving slander; either holding back a dead man, or making a sorceror or sorceress or high priestess speak, or removing a dead man from the palace, or seizing the heart, [...] seizing a man's head; to block the king's beloved; to block a beloved woman. (Sign) 8, 21° = (sign) 5, 3°: [...].

r 1616

ana kar-ṣi la₃ IGIri lu UŠ₂ DU₃ lu lu₂<<LU>>.UŠ₁₁.ZU lu munus⸢UŠ₁₁⸣.[ZU]

r 1717

lu munusDINGIR šu-ud-bu-bi lu UŠ₂ ina E₂.GAL ana ZIḫi lu ana ŠA₃ DAB [x]

r 1818

ana SAG.DU LU₂ ana DABti₃ lu₂KI::AG₂ LUGAL ana KU₅si munus<KI>.AG₂ ana KU₅si 8 21 5 3 [...]

r 1919

[x] 12 KA.DAB.BE₂.DA DU₃-ma i-šal-lim 9v 12 2 6 MUL₂.MUL₂ ša₂ PA.<<PA>>.BIL.<SAG> ⸢ZI⸣

(r 19) [...], 12°: (fixed date for rituals against) oral paralysis. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. (Sign) 9, 12° = (sign) 2, 6°: the Bristle (sign 2) is the distance of Pabilsag (sign 9).

r 2020

[...] ⸢DINGIR⸣ IGI.BAR DINGIR.ŠA₃.DIB.BA BUR₂ri DIM₂-ma AL.[SILIM]

(r 20) [...]: (fixed date for) seeing a god; undoing divine wrath. You perform (these) and it will be favourable. [...] = (sign) 2, 23°: the Bristle (sign 2) is the distance of the Goatfish (sign 10).

r 2121

[...] 2 23 MUL₂.MUL₂ ša₂ MAŠ₂! [x]

r 2222

[... pur]-⸢ru⸣-da DIM₂-ma ⸢AL.SILIM⸣ [...]

(r 22) [...] terrifying a [...]. You perform (it) and it will be favourable. [...].

. . .

(rest of reverse missing)

11(IKU){gana₂} is expected here instead of the final GU.

21(IKU){gana₂} is expected here instead of the GU.

31(IKU){gana₂} is expected here instead of GU.LA.
